gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating app metrics and health checks across the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and README up-to-date with the latest usage and health data.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee checking on plants (apps) in a greenhouse with a clipboard, representing the automated health checks and metrics gathering.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on lime green (#ecf874) code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The small bee mascot hovers nearby wearing tiny reading glasses. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on lime green (#ecf874) code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The small bee mascot hovers nearby wearing tiny reading glasses. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
